subject: [common/elasticsearch] update elasticsearch image
commit_message:
[common/elasticsearch] update elasticsearch image

switch to version 7.6.2 in guilin

Issue-ID: OOM-2579
Signed-off-by: Alexander Dehn <alexander.dehn@highstreet-technologies.com>
Change-Id: I08e226b1898ee299e8cdf1165f2783b857bcfb03
Signed-off-by: Alexander Dehn <alexander.dehn@highstreet-technologies.com>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Quick question:
Would it be possible to consider Elastic Search 7.9.1?
We have tested Elastic 7.6.1 on IPv4/Ipv6 dual stack, and it is not really working properly.

We checked 7.9.1 and that one is running fine.
